reasoning: Multiple reliable sources from May 2025 (ESPN, CBS News, IGN, GamesRadar) confirm that Rockstar Games has officially delayed the release of Grand Theft Auto VI from its original Fall 2025 window to May 26, 2026. Given the knowledge cutoff is late October 2025 and the release date is firmly set for 2026, there is practically no chance the game will be sold in Europe within the year 2025. The probability is effectively zero, so I am submitting the minimum allowed probability of 2%.
